LanguageData.VFEFactory_AstrofuelFromChemfuel.descrip: Make a batch of high-grade astrofuel by refining chemfuel.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_AstrofuelFromChemfuel.label: make astrofuel from chemfuel
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeChemfuelFromCanola.descri: Make a batch of chemfuel by extracting biofuel from canola flowers.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeChemfuelFromCanola.label: make chemfuel from canola
Make a batch of chemfuel by extracting and condensing gas from mushroom stalks.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeChemfuelFromOrganics.desc: Make a batch of chemfuel by extracting biofuel from organic feedstocks. Process will consume 30 food items and output 1 chemfuel per each 0.1 nutrition consumed. For example, 30 potatoes will produce 15 chemfuel, while 30 simple meals (0.9 nutrition) will produce 270 chemfuel.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeChemfuelFromRedWood.descr: Make a batch of chemfuel by extracting and condensing wood gas from red wood logs.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeChemfuelFromRedWood.label: make 25 chemfuel from 50 red wood logs
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeChemfuelFromWood.descript: Make a batch of chemfuel by extracting and condensing wood gas from logs.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeChemfuelFromWood.label: make chemfuel from wood
